title: Spatial Distribution of Malaria-Positive Individuals Among Non-travellers in Zanzibar
author: Fakih, Bakar S
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Spatial distribution of malaria-positive cases in Zanzibar. The data was from a rolling cross-sectional survey linked to routine reactive case detection of malaria which was carried out in Zanzibar between May 2017 and October 2018. A shape file of 1,023 point features was generated using unique latitude and longitude coordinates of surveyed houses. To access the actual cases, click on the numbers presented on the map. Continue clicking the numbers, and finally, select/click the dots to display the number of households with positive individuals in each cluster.
